meta.title: Cloudflare AI Explained
meta.subtitle: Serverless AI inference, agents, and RAG — running on the network that powers 20% of the internet
meta.author: Imbila.AI

summary: Cloudflare AI is a suite of products within Cloudflare's Developer Platform that runs open-source AI models on serverless GPUs distributed across Cloudflare's global network. It includes Workers AI (inference), AI Gateway (proxy/observability), Vectorize (vector DB), AI Search (managed RAG), and the Agents SDK (stateful agents on Durable Objects). Powered by the Infire inference engine written in Rust.

products.name: Workers AI
products.description: Call 89+ open-source models (LLMs, image gen, embeddings, TTS, ASR) via a Worker binding or REST API. Runs on NVIDIA H100 GPUs. Pricing is per-Neuron with 10,000 free per day.

products.name: AI Gateway
products.description: Sits in front of any AI provider — Workers AI, OpenAI, Anthropic. Provides request logging, analytics, caching (including semantic), rate limiting, model fallback, and cost tracking.

pricing.paid: 1M logs on Workers Paid; Logpush extra

products.name: Vectorize
products.description: Globally distributed vector database for embeddings. Supports metadata filtering, integrates with Workers AI embedding models. Enables RAG, semantic search, recommendations.

products.name: AI Search
products.description: Formerly AutoRAG. Connect an R2 bucket or website; Cloudflare handles chunking, embedding, indexing, querying. Supports continuous re-crawling, multitenancy, streaming responses.

products.name: Agents SDK
products.description: TypeScript SDK for building persistent, stateful AI agents on Durable Objects. MCP client/server support, scheduled tasks, Code Mode (reduces token usage by up to 87.5%), WebSocket hibernation.

products.name: Infire
products.description: Custom LLM inference engine written in Rust. Uses granular CUDA graphs, JIT kernel compilation, paged KV caching. 7% faster than vLLM 0.10.0 on H100s, 82% lower CPU overhead.

compute.description: Serverless functions (V8 isolates) and persistent stateful objects. Execution environment for all AI application logic.

storage.description: R2: S3-compatible object storage, zero egress fees. D1: serverless SQL. KV: global key-value.

protocol.description: Managed remote MCP servers for Cloudflare API (2,500+ endpoints via two tools) and partners (Anthropic, Stripe, Asana).

use_when: You want serverless, pay-per-use inference with no GPU reservation — particularly for variable or spiky workloads.
Latency matters and your users are geographically distributed. Edge inference in 200+ cities.
You're already on Cloudflare for Workers, Pages, R2, or DNS. Native integration.
You want to run open-source models (Llama, FLUX, Whisper) without managing GPU infrastructure.
skip_when: You need proprietary frontier models (GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini) as your primary. Workers AI only runs open-source models.
You need fine-tuning or custom model training. Cloudflare supports LoRAs but doesn't offer training infrastructure.
You need guaranteed GPU capacity for sustained high-throughput workloads. Serverless means shared resources and potential cold starts.
You need models Cloudflare doesn't carry. Catalogue is curated, not open-ended. Custom hosting requires enterprise.

use_cases.title: AI-Powered Customer Support
use_cases.description: RAG pipelines grounding LLM responses in knowledge bases. AI Search for ingestion, Workers AI for generation, Durable Objects for session continuity.

use_cases.title: Semantic Search & Recommendations
use_cases.description: Embeddings via Workers AI, stored in Vectorize, queried by meaning. Product search, content discovery, anomaly detection.

use_cases.title: Image Generation & Media Processing
use_cases.description: FLUX.2, Stable Diffusion for text-to-image. Deepgram and Whisper for speech-to-text. MeloTTS for voice synthesis. All serverless at the edge.

use_cases.title: Autonomous AI Agents
use_cases.description: Long-running agents on Agents SDK. MCP integration for tool use. Code Mode for token-efficient orchestration. WebSocket hibernation for cost control.

use_cases.title: AI-Enhanced App Security
use_cases.description: DLP false-positive reduction, email threat analysis, automated code review. Internal Bonk agent processed 7B+ tokens daily using Kimi K2.5.

use_cases.title: AI-Powered DevEx
use_cases.description: MCP servers exposing APIs to agents. Markdown for Agents auto-converts HTML. Cloudflare MCP server covers 2,500+ endpoints with two tools.

timeline.title: Workers AI Launch
timeline.detail: Initial launch with open-source models. GPU deployment in 100+ cities. Hugging Face partnership. Vectorize launches.

timeline.title: Workers AI Goes GA
timeline.detail: Neuron-based pricing ($0.011/1K). LoRA fine-tuned models. One-click Hugging Face deploys. Python Workers support.

timeline.title: GPU Upgrade & Larger Models
timeline.detail: H100 NVL GPUs. Llama 3.1 70B and 3.2 family. 180+ GPU cities. Vectorize metadata filtering. Infire engine revealed.

timeline.title: Agents SDK & MCP
timeline.detail: Agents SDK for persistent stateful agents. Remote MCP server support. Partnerships with Anthropic, Stripe, Asana.

timeline.title: AI Week — Infire Deep Dive
timeline.detail: Full Infire technical reveal (Rust). MCP Server Portals. AI Search open beta. NLWeb integration. Firewall for AI.

timeline.title: Replicate Acquisition
timeline.detail: Cloudflare acquires Replicate. Strengthens model catalogue and developer reach.

timeline.title: Frontier Models & Code Mode
timeline.detail: Kimi K2.5 (256K context). Code Mode reduces MCP tokens by 87.5%. Unified MCP server (2,500+ endpoints). Nemotron 3 and GPT-OSS added.

pricing.paid: 1M logs on Workers Paid; Logpush extra
